      const documentIntro = $('#documentIntro');
      const meter = $('#meter');
      const scorePercent = $('#scorePercent');
      const scoreRating = $('#scoreRating');
      const scoreStatus = $('#scoreStatus');
      const scoreNote = $('#scoreNote');
      const blockersBox = $('#blockersBox');
      const meterFill = $('#meterFill');
      const requiredProgress = $('#requiredProgress');
      const scoreBreakdown = $('#scoreBreakdown');
      const openLead = $('#openLead');
      const resetTest = $('#resetTest');
      const backToQuestionsMobile = $('#backToQuestionsMobile');
      const shareTest = $('#shareTest');
      const shareMessage = $('#shareMessage');
      const resetTestMobile = $('#resetTestMobile');
      const shareTestMobile = $('#shareTestMobile');
      const shareMessageMobile = $('#shareMessageMobile');
      const leadDialog = $('#leadDialog');
      const leadForm = $('#leadForm');
      const leadMessage = $('#leadMessage');

      document.querySelector('[data-start]').addEventListener('click', () => {
        introStage.classList.add('hidden');
        questionStage.classList.remove('hidden');
        saveState();
        renderQuestion();
      });

      prevQuestion.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (step > 0) {
          step -= 1;
          saveState();
          renderQuestion();
        }
      });

      nextQuestion.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (blockedByGate) {
          sendGoogleSheetSnapshot('open_contact_page');
          window.location.href = buildContactPageUrl();
          return;
        }
        if (!saveCurrentAnswer()) return;
        const gate = getGateMessage();
        if (gate) {
          showGate(gate);
          return;
        }
        const activeQuestions = getActiveQuestions();
        if (step < activeQuestions.length - 1) {
          step += 1;
          saveState();
          renderQuestion();
        } else {
          showDocuments();
        }
      });

      openLead.addEventListener('click', () => {
        sendGoogleSheetSnapshot('open_contact_page');
        window.location.href = buildContactPageUrl();
      });

      shareTest.addEventListener('click', shareCurrentTest);
      shareTestMobile.addEventListener('click', shareCurrentTest);

      async function shareCurrentTest() {
        const shareData = {
          title: '\u0422\u0435\u0441\u0442 \u043D\u0430 \u0432\u0438\u0437\u043E\u0432\u0443\u044E \u0433\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u043D\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C Migrant ID',
          text: '\u041F\u0440\u043E\u0432\u0435\u0440\u044C\u0442\u0435, \u043D\u0430\u0441\u043A\u043E\u043B\u044C\u043A\u043E \u0432\u044B \u0433\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u044B \u043A \u043F\u043E\u0434\u0430\u0447\u0435 \u043D\u0430 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0447\u0443\u044E \u0432\u0438\u0437\u0443.',
          url: PUBLIC_TEST_URL
        };
        try {
          if (navigator.share) {
            await navigator.share(shareData);
            return;
          }
          await copyShareLink();
        } catch (error) {
          if (error && error.name === 'AbortError') return;
          await copyShareLink();
        }
      }

      resetTest.addEventListener('click', resetSavedTest);
      resetTestMobile.addEventListener('click', resetSavedTest);
      backToQuestionsMobile.addEventListener('click', returnToQuestions);

      function returnToQuestions() {
        introStage.classList.add('hidden');
        testStage.classList.add('hidden');
        questionStage.classList.remove('hidden');
        const activeQuestions = getActiveQuestions();
        if (step >= activeQuestions.length) step = activeQuestions.length - 1;
        if (step < 0) step = 0;
        saveState('questions');
        renderQuestion();
        window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
      }

      function resetSavedTest() {
        try { localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY); } catch (error) {}
        Object.keys(answers).forEach(key => delete answers[key]);
        selectedDocuments.clear();
        step = 0;
        currentDocuments = [];
        introStage.classList.remove('hidden');
        questionStage.classList.add('hidden');
        testStage.classList.add('hidden');
      }

      $('#closeLead').addEventListener('click', () => leadDialog.close());

      leadForm.addEventListener('submit', event => {
        event.preventDefault();
        submitLead();
      });

      restoreState();

      function renderQuestion() {
        const activeQuestions = getActiveQuestions();
        const question = activeQuestions[step];
        blockedByGate = false;
        gateMessage.classList.add('hidden');
        questionCounter.textContent = decodeText(`\u0412\u043E\u043F\u0440\u043E\u0441 ${step + 1} \u0438\u0437 ${activeQuestions.length}`);
        questionTitle.textContent = decodeText(question.title);
        questionProgress.style.width = `${((step + 1) / activeQuestions.length) * 100}%`;
        prevQuestion.disabled = step === 0;
        nextQuestion.textContent = decodeText(step === activeQuestions.length - 1 ? '\u041F\u0435\u0440\u0435\u0439\u0442\u0438 \u043A \u0434\u043E\u043A\u0443\u043C\u0435\u043D\u0442\u0430\u043C' : '\u0414\u0430\u043B\u0435\u0435');

        if (question.type === 'select') {
          questionField.innerHTML = `
            <div class="field">
              <label for="questionInput">\u0412\u044B\u0431\u0435\u0440\u0438\u0442\u0435 \u0432\u0430\u0440\u0438\u0430\u043D\u0442</label>
              <select id="questionInput" required>
                <option value="">\u0412\u044B\u0431\u0435\u0440\u0438\u0442\u0435</option>
                ${question.options.map(option => `<option value="${escapeHtml(option)}">${escapeHtml(option)}</option>`).join('')}
              </select>
              ${question.help ? `<p class="small">${escapeHtml(question.help)}</p>` : ''}
            </div>
          `;
        } else {
          questionField.innerHTML = `
            <div class="field">
              <label for="questionInput">\u0412\u0432\u0435\u0434\u0438\u0442\u0435 \u043E\u0442\u0432\u0435\u0442</label>
              <input id="questionInput" type="text" placeholder="${escapeHtml(question.placeholder || '')}" required>
            </div>
          `;
        }

        $('#questionInput').value = answers[question.key] || '';
        $('#questionInput').focus();
      }

      function saveCurrentAnswer() {
        const question = getActiveQuestions()[step];
        const input = $('#questionInput');
        const value = input.value.trim();
        if (question.required && !value) {
          input.focus();
          input.reportValidity();
          return false;
        }
        answers[question.key] = value;
        saveState();
        return true;
      }

      function getGateMessage() {
        if (getActiveQuestions()[step].key !== 'age') return '';
        if (answers.age === '\u0434\u043E 18 \u043B\u0435\u0442') {
          return '\u0412\u044B \u0435\u0449\u0435 \u043D\u0435 \u0434\u043E\u0441\u0442\u0438\u0433\u043B\u0438 \u0441\u043E\u0432\u0435\u0440\u0448\u0435\u043D\u043D\u043E\u043B\u0435\u0442\u0438\u044F. \u041F\u043E\u043B\u0443\u0447\u0435\u043D\u0438\u0435 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0447\u0435\u0439 \u0432\u0438\u0437\u044B \u0432 \u0415\u0432\u0440\u043E\u043F\u0443 \u043D\u0435\u0432\u043E\u0437\u043C\u043E\u0436\u043D\u043E \u0431\u0435\u0437 \u0443\u0447\u0430\u0441\u0442\u0438\u044F \u0440\u043E\u0434\u0438\u0442\u0435\u043B\u0435\u0439 \u0438\u043B\u0438 \u0437\u0430\u043A\u043E\u043D\u043D\u044B\u0445 \u043F\u0440\u0435\u0434\u0441\u0442\u0430\u0432\u0438\u0442\u0435\u043B\u0435\u0439.';
        }
        if (answers.age === '\u0441\u0442\u0430\u0440\u0448\u0435 55 \u043B\u0435\u0442') {
          return '\u0414\u043B\u044F \u043A\u0430\u043D\u0434\u0438\u0434\u0430\u0442\u043E\u0432 \u0441\u0442\u0430\u0440\u0448\u0435 55 \u043B\u0435\u0442 \u043F\u043E\u043B\u0443\u0447\u0435\u043D\u0438\u0435 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0447\u0435\u0439 \u0432\u0438\u0437\u044B \u043E\u0431\u044B\u0447\u043D\u043E \u0441\u0438\u043B\u044C\u043D\u043E \u0437\u0430\u0432\u0438\u0441\u0438\u0442 \u043E\u0442 \u043A\u043E\u043D\u043A\u0440\u0435\u0442\u043D\u043E\u0439 \u0432\u0430\u043A\u0430\u043D\u0441\u0438\u0438 \u0438 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0434\u0430\u0442\u0435\u043B\u044F. \u041E\u0441\u0442\u0430\u0432\u044C\u0442\u0435 \u0437\u0430\u044F\u0432\u043A\u0443, \u0447\u0442\u043E\u0431\u044B \u043C\u0435\u043D\u0435\u0434\u0436\u0435\u0440 \u043F\u0440\u043E\u0432\u0435\u0440\u0438\u043B \u0432\u043E\u0437\u043C\u043E\u0436\u043D\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C \u0438\u043D\u0434\u0438\u0432\u0438\u0434\u0443\u0430\u043B\u044C\u043D\u043E.';
        }
        return '';
      }

      function getActiveQuestions() {
        return questions.filter(question => !question.condition || question.condition(answers));
      }

      function showGate(message) {
        blockedByGate = true;
        gateMessage.textContent = decodeText(message);
        gateMessage.classList.remove('hidden');
        nextQuestion.textContent = decodeText('\u041D\u0430\u043F\u0438\u0441\u0430\u0442\u044C \u0441\u043F\u0435\u0446\u0438\u0430\u043B\u0438\u0441\u0442\u0443');
      }

      function showDocuments() {
        questionStage.classList.add('hidden');
        testStage.classList.remove('hidden');
        currentDocuments = buildDocuments();
        renderSummary();
        renderDocuments();
        updateScore();
        saveState('documents');
      }

      function buildDocuments() {
        return baseDocuments
          .filter(doc => !doc.condition || doc.condition(answers))
          .filter(doc => !(doc.id === 'finance' && answers.destination === '\u0411\u043E\u043B\u0433\u0430\u0440\u0438\u044F'))
          .sort((a, b) => Number(Boolean(b.required)) - Number(Boolean(a.required)));
      }

      function renderSummary() {
        const finance = getFinanceText();
        documentIntro.textContent = `\u0421\u043F\u0438\u0441\u043E\u043A \u0441\u043E\u0431\u0440\u0430\u043D \u043F\u043E\u0434 \u0432\u044B\u0431\u0440\u0430\u043D\u043D\u044B\u0435 \u043F\u0430\u0440\u0430\u043C\u0435\u0442\u0440\u044B. \u0424\u0438\u043D\u0430\u043D\u0441\u043E\u0432\u043E\u0435 \u0442\u0440\u0435\u0431\u043E\u0432\u0430\u043D\u0438\u0435: ${finance}.`;
        const items = [
          ['\u0418\u043C\u044F', answers.name],
          ['\u0413\u0440\u0430\u0436\u0434\u0430\u043D\u0441\u0442\u0432\u043E', answers.citizenship],
          ['\u0412\u0430\u043A\u0430\u043D\u0441\u0438\u044F', answers.vacancy],
          ['\u042F\u0437\u044B\u043A', answers.workLanguage || '\u043D\u0435 \u0443\u043A\u0430\u0437\u0430\u043D'],
          ['\u0421\u0442\u0440\u0430\u043D\u0430', answers.destination],
          ['\u0421\u0440\u043E\u043A', answers.duration],
          ['\u0424\u0438\u043D\u0430\u043D\u0441\u044B', finance]
        ];
        if (answers.vacancy === '\u0412\u043E\u0434\u0438\u0442\u0435\u043B\u044C') {
          items.splice(5, 0,
            ['\u041A\u0430\u0442\u0435\u0433\u043E\u0440\u0438\u0438 \u043F\u0440\u0430\u0432', answers.driverCategories || '-'],
            ['Code 95', answers.driverCode95 || '-'],
            ['\u041E\u043F\u044B\u0442 GCC/\u0415\u0432\u0440\u043E\u043F\u0430', answers.driverExperienceRegion || '-'],
            ['\u0414\u043E\u043A\u0443\u043C\u0435\u043D\u0442\u044B \u043F\u043E \u043E\u043F\u044B\u0442\u0443', answers.driverExperienceProof || '-']
          );
        }
        summaryGrid.innerHTML = items.map(([label, value]) => `
          <div class="summary-item ${answers.vacancy === '\u0412\u043E\u0434\u0438\u0442\u0435\u043B\u044C' && ['\u041A\u0430\u0442\u0435\u0433\u043E\u0440\u0438\u0438 \u043F\u0440\u0430\u0432', 'Code 95', '\u041E\u043F\u044B\u0442 GCC/\u0415\u0432\u0440\u043E\u043F\u0430', '\u0414\u043E\u043A\u0443\u043C\u0435\u043D\u0442\u044B \u043F\u043E \u043E\u043F\u044B\u0442\u0443'].includes(label) ? 'driver' : ''}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${escapeHtml(value)}</strong></div>
        `).join('');
      }

      function renderDocuments() {
        documentList.innerHTML = currentDocuments.map(doc => `
          <label class="doc-row ${getDocumentStateClass(doc)}" for="doc-${escapeHtml(doc.id)}">
            <input type="checkbox" id="doc-${escapeHtml(doc.id)}" value="${escapeHtml(doc.id)}">
            <span>
              <span class="doc-title">${escapeHtml(doc.title)}</span>
              <span class="doc-hint">${escapeHtml(getDocumentHint(doc))}</span>
              ${doc.note ? `<span class="doc-note">${escapeHtml(doc.note)}</span>` : ''}
              ${renderDocControl(doc)}
            </span>
            <span class="doc-tag ${getDocumentTagClass(doc)}">${getDocumentTagText(doc)}</span>
          </label>
        `).join('');

        currentDocuments.forEach(doc => {
          $(`#doc-${doc.id}`).addEventListener('change', event => {
            if (event.target.checked && doc.control && !answers[doc.control.key]) {
              event.target.checked = false;
              event.target.closest('.doc-row').classList.remove('done');
              const control = $(`#control-${doc.control.key}`);
              control.focus();
              updateScore();
              return;
            }
            if (event.target.checked) selectedDocuments.add(doc.id);
            else selectedDocuments.delete(doc.id);
            syncDocumentRowState(doc);
            saveState('documents');
            updateScore();
          });
          if (doc.control) {
            const control = $(`#control-${doc.control.key}`);
            control.addEventListener('change', event => {
              if (doc.control.type === 'multi-select') {
                const values = Array.from(control.querySelectorAll('input:checked')).map(input => input.value);
                answers[doc.control.key] = values;
                answers.workLanguage = values.join('; ');
              } else {
                answers[doc.control.key] = event.target.value;
              }
              const checkbox = $(`#doc-${doc.id}`);
              if (isControlValuePositive(doc)) {
                checkbox.checked = true;
                selectedDocuments.add(doc.id);
              } else {
                checkbox.checked = false;
                selectedDocuments.delete(doc.id);
              }
              syncDocumentRowState(doc);
              renderSummary();
              saveState('documents');
              updateScore();
            });
          }
        });
      }

      function syncDocumentRowState(doc) {
        const row = $(`#doc-${doc.id}`).closest('.doc-row');
        row.classList.toggle('done', selectedDocuments.has(doc.id) && !isDocumentStop(doc));
        row.classList.toggle('stop', isDocumentStop(doc));
        const tag = row.querySelector('.doc-tag');
        tag.className = `doc-tag ${getDocumentTagClass(doc)}`;
        tag.textContent = getDocumentTagText(doc);
      }

      function getDocumentStateClass(doc) {
        if (isDocumentStop(doc)) return 'stop';
        return '';
      }

      function getDocumentTagClass(doc) {
        if (isDocumentStop(doc)) return 'stop';
        if (doc.required) return 'required';
        if (doc.weight >= 10) return 'strong';
        return '';
      }

      function getDocumentTagText(doc) {
        if (isDocumentStop(doc)) return '\u0441\u0442\u043E\u043F-\u0444\u0430\u043A\u0442\u043E\u0440';
        if (doc.required) return '\u043E\u0431\u044F\u0437\u0430\u0442\u0435\u043B\u044C\u043D\u043E';
        if (doc.weight >= 10) return '\u0441\u0438\u043B\u044C\u043D\u043E \u0432\u043B\u0438\u044F\u0435\u0442';
        return '\u0443\u0441\u0438\u043B\u0438\u0432\u0430\u0435\u0442';
      }

      function renderDocControl(doc) {
        if (!doc.control) return '';
        if (doc.control.type === 'multi-select') {
          const options = getControlOptions(doc);
          const selected = getMultiAnswer(doc.control.key);
          return `
            <span class="doc-control language-options" id="control-${escapeHtml(doc.control.key)}">
              ${options.map((option, index) => {
                const id = `control-${doc.control.key}-${index}`;
                return `
                  <label class="language-option" for="${escapeHtml(id)}">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="${escapeHtml(id)}" value="${escapeHtml(option)}" ${selected.includes(option) ? 'checked' : ''}>
                    <span>${escapeHtml(option)}</span>
                  </label>
                `;
              }).join('')}
            </span>
          `;
        }
        if (doc.control.type === 'select') {
          const options = getControlOptions(doc);
          return `
            <span class="doc-control">
              <select id="control-${escapeHtml(doc.control.key)}" aria-label="${escapeHtml(doc.title)}">
                <option value="">\u0412\u044B\u0431\u0435\u0440\u0438\u0442\u0435 \u0432\u0430\u0440\u0438\u0430\u043D\u0442</option>
                ${options.map(option => `<option value="${escapeHtml(option)}">${escapeHtml(option)}</option>`).join('')}
              </select>
            </span>
          `;
        }
        return '';
      }

      function getMultiAnswer(key) {
        const value = answers[key];
        if (Array.isArray(value)) return value;
        if (typeof value === 'string' && value) return value.split(';').map(item => item.trim()).filter(Boolean);
        return [];
      }

      function getControlOptions(doc) {
        if (doc.id === 'languageB1') return getLanguageOptions();
        return doc.control.options;
      }

      function getLanguageOptions() {
        const localLanguage = getDestinationLanguage();
        return Array.from(new Set([
          '\u0420\u0443\u0441\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439: \u043D\u0435\u0442 \u0431\u0430\u0437\u043E\u0432\u043E\u0433\u043E \u0443\u0440\u043E\u0432\u043D\u044F', '\u0420\u0443\u0441\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439: A1', '\u0420\u0443\u0441\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439: A2', '\u0420\u0443\u0441\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439: B1', '\u0420\u0443\u0441\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439: B2', '\u0420\u0443\u0441\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439: C1/C2',
          '\u0410\u043D\u0433\u043B\u0438\u0439\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439: \u043D\u0435\u0442 \u0431\u0430\u0437\u043E\u0432\u043E\u0433\u043E \u0443\u0440\u043E\u0432\u043D\u044F', '\u0410\u043D\u0433\u043B\u0438\u0439\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439: A1', '\u0410\u043D\u0433\u043B\u0438\u0439\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439: A2', '\u0410\u043D\u0433\u043B\u0438\u0439\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439: B1', '\u0410\u043D\u0433\u043B\u0438\u0439\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439: B2', '\u0410\u043D\u0433\u043B\u0438\u0439\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439: C1/C2',
          `${localLanguage}: \u043D\u0435\u0442 \u0431\u0430\u0437\u043E\u0432\u043E\u0433\u043E \u0443\u0440\u043E\u0432\u043D\u044F`, `${localLanguage}: A1`, `${localLanguage}: A2`, `${localLanguage}: B1`, `${localLanguage}: B2`, `${localLanguage}: C1/C2`
        ]));
      }

      function updateScore() {
        const requiredDocs = currentDocuments.filter(doc => doc.required);
        const missingRequired = requiredDocs.filter(doc => !isRequiredSatisfied(doc));
        const stopFactors = getStopFactors();
        const completedRequired = requiredDocs.length - missingRequired.length;
        const certificate = currentDocuments.find(doc => doc.id === 'migrantId');
        const supportingDocs = currentDocuments.filter(doc => !doc.required && doc.id !== 'migrantId');
        const supportingTotal = supportingDocs.reduce((sum, doc) => sum + doc.weight, 0);
        const selectedSupportingDocs = supportingDocs.filter(doc => selectedDocuments.has(doc.id));
        const supportingSelected = selectedSupportingDocs
          .reduce((sum, doc) => sum + getDocumentWeight(doc), 0);
        const certificateScore = certificate && selectedDocuments.has(certificate.id) ? 20 : 0;
        const supportingScore = supportingTotal && supportingSelected
          ? Math.max(1, Math.round((supportingSelected / supportingTotal) * 10))
          : 0;
        const requiredTotal = requiredDocs.reduce((sum, doc) => sum + getRequiredWeight(doc), 0);
        const requiredSelected = requiredDocs.reduce((sum, doc) => sum + (isRequiredSatisfied(doc) ? getRequiredWeight(doc) : 0), 0);
        const requiredProgressScore = requiredTotal ? Math.round((requiredSelected / requiredTotal) * 70) : 0;
        const rawPercent = Math.min(100, requiredProgressScore + certificateScore + supportingScore);
        const percent = stopFactors.length ? Math.min(rawPercent, getStopScoreCap(stopFactors)) : rawPercent;

        currentScore = getScore(percent, missingRequired, stopFactors);
        currentScore.percent = `${percent}%`;

        scorePercent.textContent = `${percent}%`;
        scoreRating.textContent = `\u0420\u0435\u0439\u0442\u0438\u043D\u0433 ${currentScore.rating}`;
        scoreStatus.textContent = currentScore.status;
        scoreNote.textContent = currentScore.note;
        meterFill.style.width = `${percent}%`;
        meterFill.style.background = `linear-gradient(90deg, ${currentScore.color}, ${currentScore.color}dd)`;
        scorePercent.style.color = currentScore.color;
        requiredProgress.textContent = `\u041E\u0431\u044F\u0437\u0430\u0442\u0435\u043B\u044C\u043D\u044B\u0435 \u043F\u0443\u043D\u043A\u0442\u044B: ${completedRequired} \u0438\u0437 ${requiredDocs.length}`;
        scoreBreakdown.textContent = `\u0412\u0438\u0437\u0430: ${requiredProgressScore}% \u00B7 \u041F\u0440\u043E\u0444\u0438\u043B\u044C: +${supportingScore}% \u00B7 Migrant ID: +${certificateScore}%`;
        if (percent > previousPercent) {
          meter.classList.remove('bump');
          void meter.offsetWidth;
          meter.classList.add('bump');
        }
        previousPercent = percent;
        openLead.disabled = selectedDocuments.size === 0;
        testStage.classList.toggle('certificate-active', selectedDocuments.has('migrantId'));

        if (stopFactors.length) {
          blockersBox.innerHTML = `<strong>\u0421\u0442\u043E\u043F-\u0444\u0430\u043A\u0442\u043E\u0440: \u043D\u0443\u0436\u043D\u0430 \u043A\u043E\u043D\u0441\u0443\u043B\u044C\u0442\u0430\u0446\u0438\u044F \u0434\u043E \u043F\u043E\u0434\u0430\u0447\u0438</strong><br>${stopFactors.map(item => escapeHtml(item.message)).join('<br>')}`;
          blockersBox.classList.add('stop');
          blockersBox.classList.remove('hidden');
        } else if (missingRequired.length) {
          blockersBox.innerHTML = `<strong>\u0421\u043D\u0430\u0447\u0430\u043B\u0430 \u043D\u0443\u0436\u043D\u043E \u0437\u0430\u043A\u0440\u044B\u0442\u044C \u043E\u0431\u044F\u0437\u0430\u0442\u0435\u043B\u044C\u043D\u044B\u0435 \u0443\u0441\u043B\u043E\u0432\u0438\u044F:</strong><br>${missingRequired.map(doc => escapeHtml(doc.title)).join('<br>')}`;
          blockersBox.classList.remove('stop');
          blockersBox.classList.remove('hidden');
        } else {
          blockersBox.classList.add('hidden');
          blockersBox.classList.remove('stop');
          blockersBox.innerHTML = '';
        }
      }

      function isRequiredSatisfied(doc) {
        if (!selectedDocuments.has(doc.id)) return false;
        if (doc.id === 'languageB1') return getLanguageWeight() >= getMinimumLanguageWeight();
        if (doc.id === 'criminal') return answers.criminalStatus === '\u0415\u0441\u0442\u044C \u0441\u043F\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043A\u0430, \u0441\u0443\u0434\u0438\u043C\u043E\u0441\u0442\u0438 \u043D\u0435\u0442';
        if (doc.id === 'driverExperienceProofDoc') return ['\u0414\u0430', '\u0427\u0430\u0441\u0442\u0438\u0447\u043D\u043E'].includes(answers.driverExperienceProof);
        if (doc.id === 'driverLicense') return Boolean(answers.driverCategories);
        return true;
      }

      function isControlValuePositive(doc) {
        if (!answers[doc.control.key]) return false;
        if (doc.id === 'languageB1') return getLanguageWeight() > 0;
        if (doc.id === 'criminal') return answers.criminalStatus === '\u0415\u0441\u0442\u044C \u0441\u043F\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043A\u0430, \u0441\u0443\u0434\u0438\u043C\u043E\u0441\u0442\u0438 \u043D\u0435\u0442';
        if (doc.id === 'code95') return getDocumentWeight(doc) > 0;
        if (doc.id === 'gccEuExperience') return getDocumentWeight(doc) > 0;
        if (doc.id === 'driverExperienceProofDoc') return ['\u0414\u0430', '\u0427\u0430\u0441\u0442\u0438\u0447\u043D\u043E'].includes(answers.driverExperienceProof);
        if (doc.id === 'driverLicense') return Boolean(answers.driverCategories);
        return true;
      }

      function getDocumentWeight(doc) {
        if (doc.id === 'languageB1') return getLanguageWeight();
        if (doc.id === 'criminal') return answers.criminalStatus === '\u0415\u0441\u0442\u044C \u0441\u043F\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043A\u0430, \u0441\u0443\u0434\u0438\u043C\u043E\u0441\u0442\u0438 \u043D\u0435\u0442' ? 12 : 0;
        if (doc.id === 'code95') {
          if (answers.driverCode95 === '\u0414\u0430, \u0434\u0435\u0439\u0441\u0442\u0432\u0443\u044E\u0449\u0438\u0439') return 10;
          if (answers.driverCode95 === '\u0412 \u043F\u0440\u043E\u0446\u0435\u0441\u0441\u0435 \u043E\u0444\u043E\u0440\u043C\u043B\u0435\u043D\u0438\u044F') return 5;
          return 0;
        }
        if (doc.id === 'gccEuExperience') {
          if (answers.driverExperienceRegion === '\u0414\u0430, GCC \u0438 \u0415\u0432\u0440\u043E\u043F\u0430') return 7;
          if (answers.driverExperienceRegion === '\u0414\u0430, \u0432 \u0441\u0442\u0440\u0430\u043D\u0430\u0445 GCC' || answers.driverExperienceRegion === '\u0414\u0430, \u0432 \u0415\u0432\u0440\u043E\u043F\u0435') return 5;
          return 0;
        }
        return doc.weight || 0;
      }

      function isDocumentStop(doc) {
        if (doc.id === 'criminal') return answers.criminalStatus === '\u0415\u0441\u0442\u044C \u0441\u0443\u0434\u0438\u043C\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C / \u0431\u044B\u043B\u0430 \u0441\u0443\u0434\u0438\u043C\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C';
        if (doc.id === 'languageB1') return getSelectedLanguages().length > 0 && getLanguageReadiness().stop;
        return false;
      }

      function getStopFactors() {
        const factors = [];
        const criminalDoc = currentDocuments.find(doc => doc.id === 'criminal');
        if (criminalDoc && answers.criminalStatus === '\u0415\u0441\u0442\u044C \u0441\u0443\u0434\u0438\u043C\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C / \u0431\u044B\u043B\u0430 \u0441\u0443\u0434\u0438\u043C\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C') {
          factors.push({
            type: 'criminal',
            cap: 25,
            message: '\u0415\u0441\u0442\u044C \u0441\u0443\u0434\u0438\u043C\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C \u0438\u043B\u0438 \u0431\u044B\u043B\u0430 \u0441\u0443\u0434\u0438\u043C\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C \u043F\u0440\u0438 \u0442\u0440\u0435\u0431\u0443\u0435\u043C\u043E\u0439 \u0441\u043F\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043A\u0435. \u0420\u0438\u0441\u043A \u043E\u0442\u043A\u0430\u0437\u0430 \u0432\u044B\u0441\u043E\u043A\u0438\u0439, \u043D\u0443\u0436\u043D\u0430 \u0438\u043D\u0434\u0438\u0432\u0438\u0434\u0443\u0430\u043B\u044C\u043D\u0430\u044F \u043E\u0446\u0435\u043D\u043A\u0430 \u0434\u043E \u043F\u043E\u0434\u0430\u0447\u0438.'
          });
        }

        const languageDoc = currentDocuments.find(doc => doc.id === 'languageB1');
        const language = getLanguageReadiness();
        if (languageDoc && getSelectedLanguages().length > 0 && language.stop) {
          factors.push({
            type: 'language',
            cap: 35,
            message: '\u042F\u0437\u044B\u043A \u043D\u0435 \u0437\u0430\u043A\u0440\u044B\u0432\u0430\u0435\u0442 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0447\u0443\u044E \u043A\u043E\u043C\u043C\u0443\u043D\u0438\u043A\u0430\u0446\u0438\u044E \u0434\u043B\u044F \u0432\u044B\u0431\u0440\u0430\u043D\u043D\u043E\u0439 \u0441\u0442\u0440\u0430\u043D\u044B. \u041D\u0443\u0436\u0435\u043D \u0430\u043D\u0433\u043B\u0438\u0439\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439 \u0438\u043B\u0438 \u044F\u0437\u044B\u043A \u0441\u0442\u0440\u0430\u043D\u044B \u0445\u043E\u0442\u044F \u0431\u044B \u043D\u0430 \u0431\u0430\u0437\u043E\u0432\u043E\u043C \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0447\u0435\u043C \u0443\u0440\u043E\u0432\u043D\u0435.'
          });
        }

        return factors;
      }

      function getStopScoreCap(stopFactors) {
        return stopFactors.reduce((cap, item) => Math.min(cap, item.cap), 35);
      }

      function getRequiredWeight(doc) {
        if (doc.id === 'passport') return 12;
        if (doc.id === 'contract') return 20;
        if (doc.id === 'finance') return 18;
        if (doc.id === 'languageB1') return 18;
        if (doc.id === 'criminal') return 12;
        if (doc.id === 'driverLicense') return 10;
        if (doc.id === 'driverExperienceProofDoc') return 8;
        if (doc.id === 'driverMedical') return 6;
        return 8;
      }

      function getScore(percent, missingRequired, stopFactors) {
        if (stopFactors && stopFactors.length) return {
          rating: 'STOP',
          color: '#d83232',
          status: '\u0421\u0442\u043E\u043F-\u0444\u0430\u043A\u0442\u043E\u0440 \u043F\u0435\u0440\u0435\u0434 \u043F\u043E\u0434\u0430\u0447\u0435\u0439',
          note: '\u041F\u043E \u044D\u0442\u0438\u043C \u0434\u0430\u043D\u043D\u044B\u043C \u043D\u0435\u043B\u044C\u0437\u044F \u0441\u0447\u0438\u0442\u0430\u0442\u044C \u043F\u0430\u043A\u0435\u0442 \u0433\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u044B\u043C \u043A \u0432\u0438\u0437\u043E\u0432\u043E\u0439 \u043F\u043E\u0434\u0430\u0447\u0435. \u041D\u0443\u0436\u043D\u0430 \u0438\u043D\u0434\u0438\u0432\u0438\u0434\u0443\u0430\u043B\u044C\u043D\u0430\u044F \u043F\u0440\u043E\u0432\u0435\u0440\u043A\u0430 \u043A\u043E\u043D\u0441\u0443\u043B\u044C\u0442\u0430\u043D\u0442\u043E\u043C, \u043D\u043E \u0437\u0430\u044F\u0432\u043A\u0443 \u043E\u0441\u0442\u0430\u0432\u0438\u0442\u044C \u0441\u0442\u043E\u0438\u0442.'
        };
        if (missingRequired && missingRequired.length) return {
          rating: 'C',
          color: '#d83232',
          status: '\u041F\u0430\u043A\u0435\u0442 \u0435\u0449\u0451 \u043D\u0435 \u0433\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432 \u043A \u043F\u043E\u0434\u0430\u0447\u0435',
          note: '\u041F\u0440\u043E\u0433\u0440\u0435\u0441\u0441 \u0443\u0436\u0435 \u0435\u0441\u0442\u044C, \u043D\u043E \u043F\u043E\u043A\u0430 \u043D\u0435 \u0437\u0430\u043A\u0440\u044B\u0442 \u043E\u0431\u044F\u0437\u0430\u0442\u0435\u043B\u044C\u043D\u044B\u0439 \u043C\u0438\u043D\u0438\u043C\u0443\u043C. \u041D\u0438\u0436\u0435 \u043F\u043E\u043A\u0430\u0437\u0430\u043D\u043E, \u0447\u0435\u0433\u043E \u0438\u043C\u0435\u043D\u043D\u043E \u043D\u0435 \u0445\u0432\u0430\u0442\u0430\u0435\u0442.'
        };
        if (percent >= 91) return {
          rating: 'A+',
          color: '#16894a',
          status: '\u041E\u0442\u043B\u0438\u0447\u043D\u0430\u044F \u0433\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u043D\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C',
          note: '\u041F\u0430\u043A\u0435\u0442 \u0432\u044B\u0433\u043B\u044F\u0434\u0438\u0442 \u0441\u0438\u043B\u044C\u043D\u044B\u043C. \u041F\u0435\u0440\u0435\u0434 \u043F\u043E\u0434\u0430\u0447\u0435\u0439 \u0441\u0442\u043E\u0438\u0442 \u043F\u0440\u043E\u0432\u0435\u0440\u0438\u0442\u044C \u0430\u043A\u0442\u0443\u0430\u043B\u044C\u043D\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C \u0442\u0440\u0435\u0431\u043E\u0432\u0430\u043D\u0438\u0439 \u043A\u043E\u043D\u043A\u0440\u0435\u0442\u043D\u043E\u0433\u043E \u043A\u043E\u043D\u0441\u0443\u043B\u044C\u0441\u0442\u0432\u0430.'
        };
        if (percent >= 76) return {
          rating: 'A',
          color: '#55a630',
          status: '\u0425\u043E\u0440\u043E\u0448\u0430\u044F \u0433\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u043D\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C',
          note: '\u0411\u043E\u043B\u044C\u0448\u0430\u044F \u0447\u0430\u0441\u0442\u044C \u0434\u043E\u043A\u0443\u043C\u0435\u043D\u0442\u043E\u0432 \u0443\u0436\u0435 \u0441\u043E\u0431\u0440\u0430\u043D\u0430. \u041E\u0441\u0442\u0430\u044E\u0442\u0441\u044F \u043E\u0442\u0434\u0435\u043B\u044C\u043D\u044B\u0435 \u0434\u043E\u043A\u0443\u043C\u0435\u043D\u0442\u044B \u0438\u043B\u0438 \u0443\u0442\u043E\u0447\u043D\u0435\u043D\u0438\u044F.'
        };
        if (percent >= 61) return {
          rating: 'B+',
          color: '#c79718',
          status: '\u0421\u0440\u0435\u0434\u043D\u044F\u044F \u0433\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u043D\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C',
          note: '\u041F\u0430\u043A\u0435\u0442 \u043C\u043E\u0436\u043D\u043E \u0443\u0441\u0438\u043B\u0438\u0442\u044C. \u041B\u0443\u0447\u0448\u0435 \u0437\u0430\u043A\u0440\u044B\u0442\u044C \u043D\u0435\u0434\u043E\u0441\u0442\u0430\u044E\u0449\u0438\u0435 \u0434\u043E\u043A\u0443\u043C\u0435\u043D\u0442\u044B \u0434\u043E \u0437\u0430\u043F\u0438\u0441\u0438 \u043D\u0430 \u043F\u043E\u0434\u0430\u0447\u0443.'
        };
        if (percent >= 41) return {
          rating: 'B1',
          color: '#e56b1f',
          status: '\u041D\u0443\u0436\u043D\u0430 \u0434\u043E\u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0442\u043A\u0430',
          note: '\u0415\u0441\u0442\u044C \u043E\u0441\u043D\u043E\u0432\u0430, \u043D\u043E \u0440\u0438\u0441\u043A \u043E\u0442\u043A\u0430\u0437\u0430 \u043E\u0441\u0442\u0430\u0435\u0442\u0441\u044F \u0437\u0430\u043C\u0435\u0442\u043D\u044B\u043C. \u041D\u0443\u0436\u0435\u043D \u043F\u043B\u0430\u043D \u043F\u043E\u0434\u0433\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u043A\u0438 \u0434\u043E\u043A\u0443\u043C\u0435\u043D\u0442\u043E\u0432.'
        };
        return {
          rating: 'C',
          color: '#d83232',
          status: '\u041D\u0438\u0437\u043A\u0430\u044F \u0433\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u043D\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C',
          note: '\u041F\u0430\u043A\u0435\u0442 \u043F\u043E\u043A\u0430 \u0441\u043B\u0430\u0431\u044B\u0439. \u041D\u0430\u0447\u043D\u0438\u0442\u0435 \u0441 \u043F\u0430\u0441\u043F\u043E\u0440\u0442\u0430, \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0434\u0430\u0442\u0435\u043B\u044F, \u0444\u0438\u043D\u0430\u043D\u0441\u043E\u0432\u043E\u0433\u043E \u043F\u043E\u0434\u0442\u0432\u0435\u0440\u0436\u0434\u0435\u043D\u0438\u044F \u0438 \u0431\u0430\u0437\u043E\u0432\u044B\u0445 \u0434\u043E\u043A\u0443\u043C\u0435\u043D\u0442\u043E\u0432.'
        };
      }

      function getFinanceText() {
        if (answers.destination === '\u0411\u043E\u043B\u0433\u0430\u0440\u0438\u044F') return '\u043F\u043E\u0434\u0442\u0432\u0435\u0440\u0436\u0434\u0435\u043D\u0438\u0435 \u0434\u0435\u043D\u0435\u0433 \u043D\u0430 \u0441\u0447\u0435\u0442\u0435 \u043D\u0435 \u0442\u0440\u0435\u0431\u0443\u0435\u0442\u0441\u044F';
        if (easternEurope.has(answers.destination)) return '\u043E\u0442 700 EUR \u043D\u0430 \u0441\u0447\u0435\u0442\u0435 \u043D\u0435 \u043C\u0435\u043D\u0435\u0435 28 \u0434\u043D\u0435\u0439';
        return '\u043E\u0442 1500 EUR \u043D\u0430 \u0441\u0447\u0435\u0442\u0435 \u043D\u0435 \u043C\u0435\u043D\u0435\u0435 28 \u0434\u043D\u0435\u0439';
      }

      function getDocumentHint(doc) {
        if (doc.id === 'languageB1') return getLanguageText();
        if (doc.id !== 'finance') return doc.hint;
        return getFinanceText() + '. ' + doc.hint;
      }

      function getLanguageText() {
        const localLanguage = getDestinationLanguage();
        if (easternEurope.has(answers.destination)) {
          return `\u0414\u043B\u044F \u0432\u044B\u0431\u0440\u0430\u043D\u043D\u043E\u0439 \u0441\u0442\u0440\u0430\u043D\u044B \u0441\u0438\u043B\u044C\u043D\u0435\u0435 \u0432\u0441\u0435\u0433\u043E \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0442\u0430\u0435\u0442 ${localLanguage} \u0438\u043B\u0438 \u0430\u043D\u0433\u043B\u0438\u0439\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439. \u0420\u0443\u0441\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439 \u043C\u043E\u0436\u0435\u0442 \u043F\u043E\u043C\u043E\u0447\u044C \u0432 \u0447\u0430\u0441\u0442\u0438 \u0412\u043E\u0441\u0442\u043E\u0447\u043D\u043E\u0439 \u0415\u0432\u0440\u043E\u043F\u044B, \u043D\u043E \u0434\u0430\u0451\u0442 \u043C\u0435\u043D\u044C\u0448\u0438\u0439 \u0432\u0435\u0441, \u0447\u0435\u043C \u044F\u0437\u044B\u043A \u0441\u0442\u0440\u0430\u043D\u044B \u0438\u043B\u0438 \u0430\u043D\u0433\u043B\u0438\u0439\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439. \u041A\u043E\u043C\u0444\u043E\u0440\u0442\u043D\u044B\u0439 \u043C\u0438\u043D\u0438\u043C\u0443\u043C \u0434\u043B\u044F \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0442\u044B - B1.`;
        }
        return `\u0414\u043B\u044F \u0432\u044B\u0431\u0440\u0430\u043D\u043D\u043E\u0439 \u0441\u0442\u0440\u0430\u043D\u044B \u0443\u0447\u0438\u0442\u044B\u0432\u0430\u0435\u0442\u0441\u044F \u0430\u043D\u0433\u043B\u0438\u0439\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439 \u0438\u043B\u0438 ${localLanguage}. \u0420\u0443\u0441\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439 \u0431\u0435\u0437 \u0430\u043D\u0433\u043B\u0438\u0439\u0441\u043A\u043E\u0433\u043E \u0438\u043B\u0438 \u044F\u0437\u044B\u043A\u0430 \u0441\u0442\u0440\u0430\u043D\u044B \u043D\u0435 \u0437\u0430\u043A\u0440\u044B\u0432\u0430\u0435\u0442 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0447\u0443\u044E \u043A\u043E\u043C\u043C\u0443\u043D\u0438\u043A\u0430\u0446\u0438\u044E \u0438 \u0441\u0447\u0438\u0442\u0430\u0435\u0442\u0441\u044F \u0441\u0442\u043E\u043F-\u0444\u0430\u043A\u0442\u043E\u0440\u043E\u043C \u0434\u043B\u044F \u0432\u0438\u0437\u043E\u0432\u043E\u0439 \u0433\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u043D\u043E\u0441\u0442\u0438.`;
      }

      function getLanguageWeight() {
        const readiness = getLanguageReadiness();
        return readiness.weight;
      }

      function getMinimumLanguageWeight() {
        return easternEurope.has(answers.destination) ? 3 : 4;
      }

      function getLanguageReadiness() {
        const values = getSelectedLanguages();
        if (!values.length) {
          return { weight: 0, relevant: false, stop: true, label: '\u044F\u0437\u044B\u043A \u043D\u0435 \u0443\u043A\u0430\u0437\u0430\u043D' };
        }

        const options = values.map(getSingleLanguageReadiness);
        const best = options.reduce((current, item) => item.weight > current.weight ? item : current, options[0]);
        const hasRelevant = options.some(item => item.relevant);
        return {
          weight: best.weight,
          relevant: hasRelevant,
          stop: best.weight < getMinimumLanguageWeight(),
          label: best.label
        };
      }

      function getSelectedLanguages() {
        const values = getMultiAnswer('workLanguage');
        if (values.length) return values;
        return getMultiAnswer('workLanguages');
      }

      function getSingleLanguageReadiness(value) {
        if (!value || value.includes('\u043D\u0435\u0442 \u0431\u0430\u0437\u043E\u0432\u043E\u0433\u043E \u0443\u0440\u043E\u0432\u043D\u044F')) {
          return { weight: 0, relevant: false, stop: true, label: value || '\u044F\u0437\u044B\u043A \u043D\u0435 \u0443\u043A\u0430\u0437\u0430\u043D' };
        }

        const parts = value.split(': ');
        const language = parts[0];
        const level = value.includes('C1/C2') ? 'C1/C2' : parts[1];
        const levelScores = { A1: 3, A2: 6, B1: 12, B2: 15, 'C1/C2': 17 };
        const base = levelScores[level] || 0;
        const localLanguage = getDestinationLanguage();
        const localLanguages = getDestinationLanguages();
        const isEnglish = language === '\u0410\u043D\u0433\u043B\u0438\u0439\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439';
        const isRussian = language === '\u0420\u0443\u0441\u0441\u043A\u0438\u0439';
        const isLocal = localLanguages.includes(language) || language === localLanguage;

        if (isLocal || isEnglish) {
          return { weight: base, relevant: true, stop: base < getMinimumLanguageWeight(), label: `${language}: ${level}` };
        }

        if (isRussian && easternEurope.has(answers.destination)) {
          const reduced = Math.min(base, level === 'A1' ? 2 : level === 'A2' ? 4 : 7);
          return { weight: reduced, relevant: true, stop: reduced < getMinimumLanguageWeight(), label: `${language}: ${level}` };
        }

        return { weight: 0, relevant: false, stop: true, label: `${language}: ${level}` };
      }

      function getDestinationLanguage() {
        return formatLanguageName(countryLanguages[answers.destination] || '\u044F\u0437\u044B\u043A \u0432\u044B\u0431\u0440\u0430\u043D\u043D\u043E\u0439 \u0441\u0442\u0440\u0430\u043D\u044B');
      }

      function getDestinationLanguages() {
        return splitLanguageNames(countryLanguages[answers.destination] || '').map(formatLanguageName);
      }

      function splitLanguageNames(value) {
        return value
          .split(/\s*(?:,| \u0438\u043B\u0438 | \u0438 )\s*/i)
          .map(item => item.trim())
          .filter(Boolean);
      }

      function formatLanguageName(value) {
        return value
          .split(/(\s+|,\s*)/)
          .map(part => {
            const lower = part.toLowerCase();
            if (lower === '\u0438' || lower === '\u0438\u043B\u0438') return lower;
            return part.replace(/^([a-z\u0430-\u044F\u0451])/, letter => letter.toUpperCase());
          })
          .join('');
      }

      function needsCriminalRecord(answers) {
        const sensitiveJobs = ['\u041C\u0435\u0434\u0438\u0446\u0438\u043D\u0430', '\u041E\u0431\u0440\u0430\u0437\u043E\u0432\u0430\u043D\u0438\u0435', '\u0423\u0445\u043E\u0434 \u0438 \u0441\u043E\u0446\u0438\u0430\u043B\u044C\u043D\u0430\u044F \u043F\u043E\u043C\u043E\u0449\u044C'];
        if (sensitiveJobs.includes(answers.vacancy)) return true;
        if (answers.vacancy === '\u0421\u0435\u0437\u043E\u043D\u043D\u0430\u044F \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0442\u0430' && ['\u0434\u043E 3 \u043C\u0435\u0441\u044F\u0446\u0435\u0432', '3-6 \u043C\u0435\u0441\u044F\u0446\u0435\u0432'].includes(answers.duration)) return false;
        return ['6-12 \u043C\u0435\u0441\u044F\u0446\u0435\u0432', '\u0431\u043E\u043B\u0435\u0435 \u0433\u043E\u0434\u0430'].includes(answers.duration);
      }

      async function submitLead() {
        const formData = new FormData(leadForm);
        const payload = buildLeadPayload(formData);

        if (!BITRIX_WEBHOOK_URL) {
          const formUrl = buildContactPageUrl();
          showLeadMessage('\u041E\u0442\u043A\u0440\u044B\u0432\u0430\u0435\u043C \u0441\u0442\u0440\u0430\u043D\u0438\u0446\u0443 \u0441\u0432\u044F\u0437\u0438. \u0412\u044B\u0431\u0435\u0440\u0438\u0442\u0435 \u0443\u0434\u043E\u0431\u043D\u044B\u0439 \u0441\u043F\u043E\u0441\u043E\u0431 \u043E\u0431\u0449\u0435\u043D\u0438\u044F, \u0441\u043F\u0435\u0446\u0438\u0430\u043B\u0438\u0441\u0442 Migrant ID \u043F\u043E\u0434\u0441\u043A\u0430\u0436\u0435\u0442 \u0441\u043B\u0435\u0434\u0443\u044E\u0449\u0438\u0439 \u0448\u0430\u0433.', false);
          window.open(formUrl, '_blank', 'noopener');
          console.log('Bitrix24 lead payload:', payload);
          return;
        }

        try {
          const response = await fetch(BITRIX_WEBHOOK_URL, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ fields: payload.fields, params: { REGISTER_SONET_EVENT: 'Y' } })
          });
          if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Bitrix24 request failed');
          showLeadMessage('\u0417\u0430\u044F\u0432\u043A\u0430 \u043E\u0442\u043F\u0440\u0430\u0432\u043B\u0435\u043D\u0430. \u041C\u044B \u0441\u043A\u043E\u0440\u043E \u0441\u0432\u044F\u0436\u0435\u043C\u0441\u044F \u0441 \u0432\u0430\u043C\u0438.', false);
          leadForm.reset();
        } catch (error) {
          showLeadMessage('\u041D\u0435 \u0443\u0434\u0430\u043B\u043E\u0441\u044C \u043E\u0442\u043F\u0440\u0430\u0432\u0438\u0442\u044C \u0437\u0430\u044F\u0432\u043A\u0443. \u041F\u0440\u043E\u0432\u0435\u0440\u044C\u0442\u0435 \u0432\u0435\u0431\u0445\u0443\u043A \u0411\u0438\u0442\u0440\u0438\u043A\u044124 \u0438\u043B\u0438 \u0438\u0441\u043F\u043E\u043B\u044C\u0437\u0443\u0439\u0442\u0435 \u0441\u0435\u0440\u0432\u0435\u0440\u043D\u044B\u0439 \u043E\u0431\u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0442\u0447\u0438\u043A.', true);
        }
      }

      function buildLeadPayload(formData) {
        const selected = currentDocuments
          .filter(doc => selectedDocuments.has(doc.id))
          .map(doc => doc.title);
        const missing = currentDocuments
          .filter(doc => !selectedDocuments.has(doc.id))
          .map(doc => doc.title);

        const comments = [
          '\u0422\u0435\u0441\u0442 \u043D\u0430 \u0432\u0438\u0437\u043E\u0432\u0443\u044E \u0433\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u043D\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C',
          `\u0412\u043E\u0437\u0440\u0430\u0441\u0442: ${answers.age || '-'}`,
          `\u0413\u0440\u0430\u0436\u0434\u0430\u043D\u0441\u0442\u0432\u043E: ${answers.citizenship || '-'}`,
          `\u0412\u0430\u043A\u0430\u043D\u0441\u0438\u044F: ${answers.vacancy || '-'}`,
          `\u042F\u0437\u044B\u043A \u0434\u043B\u044F \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0442\u044B: ${answers.workLanguage || '-'}`,
          `\u0411\u0430\u043B\u043B\u044B \u0437\u0430 \u044F\u0437\u044B\u043A: ${getLanguageWeight()} \u0438\u0437 17`,
          `\u0421\u0442\u0430\u0442\u0443\u0441 \u043F\u043E \u0441\u0443\u0434\u0438\u043C\u043E\u0441\u0442\u0438: ${answers.criminalStatus || '-'}`,
          `\u0421\u0442\u043E\u043F-\u0444\u0430\u043A\u0442\u043E\u0440\u044B: ${getStopFactors().map(item => item.message).join('; ') || '-'}`,
          answers.vacancy === '\u0412\u043E\u0434\u0438\u0442\u0435\u043B\u044C' ? `\u041A\u0430\u0442\u0435\u0433\u043E\u0440\u0438\u0438 \u043F\u0440\u0430\u0432: ${answers.driverCategories || '-'}` : '',
          answers.vacancy === '\u0412\u043E\u0434\u0438\u0442\u0435\u043B\u044C' ? `Code 95: ${answers.driverCode95 || '-'}` : '',
          answers.vacancy === '\u0412\u043E\u0434\u0438\u0442\u0435\u043B\u044C' ? `\u041E\u043F\u044B\u0442 GCC/\u0415\u0432\u0440\u043E\u043F\u0430: ${answers.driverExperienceRegion || '-'}` : '',
          answers.vacancy === '\u0412\u043E\u0434\u0438\u0442\u0435\u043B\u044C' ? `\u041F\u043E\u0434\u0442\u0432\u0435\u0440\u0436\u0434\u0435\u043D\u0438\u0435 \u043E\u043F\u044B\u0442\u0430 \u0434\u043E\u043A\u0443\u043C\u0435\u043D\u0442\u0430\u043C\u0438: ${answers.driverExperienceProof || '-'}` : '',
          `\u0421\u0442\u0440\u0430\u043D\u0430 \u0440\u0430\u0431\u043E\u0442\u044B: ${answers.destination || '-'}`,
          `\u0421\u0440\u043E\u043A: ${answers.duration || '-'}`,
          `\u0424\u0438\u043D\u0430\u043D\u0441\u043E\u0432\u043E\u0435 \u0442\u0440\u0435\u0431\u043E\u0432\u0430\u043D\u0438\u0435: ${getFinanceText()}`,
          `\u0413\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u043D\u043E\u0441\u0442\u044C: ${currentScore.percent || scorePercent.textContent}`,
          `\u0420\u0435\u0439\u0442\u0438\u043D\u0433: ${currentScore.rating}`,
          `\u0421\u0442\u0430\u0442\u0443\u0441: ${currentScore.status}`,
          `\u0413\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u044B\u0435 \u0434\u043E\u043A\u0443\u043C\u0435\u043D\u0442\u044B: ${selected.join(', ') || '-'}`,
          `\u041D\u0435 \u0445\u0432\u0430\u0442\u0430\u0435\u0442: ${missing.join(', ') || '-'}`
        ].filter(Boolean).join('\n');

        const fields = {
          TITLE: `\u0422\u0435\u0441\u0442 \u0432\u0438\u0437\u043E\u0432\u043E\u0439 \u0433\u043E\u0442\u043E\u0432\u043D\u043E\u0441\u0442\u0438: ${formData.get('name') || answers.name || '\u043A\u0430\u043D\u0434\u0438\u0434\u0430\u0442'}`,
          NAME: formData.get('name') || answers.name || '',
          PHONE: formData.get('phone') ? [{ VALUE: formData.get('phone'), VALUE_TYPE: 'WORK' }] : [],
          EMAIL: formData.get('email') ? [{ VALUE: formData.get('email'), VALUE_TYPE: 'WORK' }] : [],
          SOURCE_ID: BITRIX_SOURCE_ID,
          COMMENTS: comments
        };

        if (BITRIX_ASSIGNED_BY_ID) fields.ASSIGNED_BY_ID = BITRIX_ASSIGNED_BY_ID;
        if (formData.get('telegram')) fields.IM = [{ VALUE: formData.get('telegram'), VALUE_TYPE: 'TELEGRAM' }];

        return { fields };
      }

      function buildContactPageUrl() {
        const url = new URL(CONTACT_PAGE_URL);
        if (answers.name) url.searchParams.set('name', answers.name);
        return url.toString();
      }

      function getSubmissionSnapshot(eventName) {
        const selected = currentDocuments
          .filter(doc => selectedDocuments.has(doc.id))
          .map(doc => doc.title);
        const missing = currentDocuments
          .filter(doc => !selectedDocuments.has(doc.id))
          .map(doc => doc.title);
        const now = new Date();
        return {
          event: eventName,
          submittedAtIso: now.toISOString(),
          submittedAtLocal: now.toLocaleString('ru-RU'),
          device: getDeviceLabel(),
          userAgent: navigator.userAgent,
          viewport: `${window.innerWidth}x${window.innerHeight}`,
          pageUrl: window.location.href,
          publicTestUrl: PUBLIC_TEST_URL,
          name: answers.name || '',
          age: answers.age || '',
          citizenship: answers.citizenship || '',
          vacancy: answers.vacancy || '',
          destination: answers.destination || '',
          duration: answers.duration || '',
          workLanguage: answers.workLanguage || '',
          criminalStatus: answers.criminalStatus || '',
          driverCategories: answers.driverCategories || '',
          driverCode95: answers.driverCode95 || '',
          driverExperienceRegion: answers.driverExperienceRegion || '',
          driverExperienceProof: answers.driverExperienceProof || '',
          financeRequirement: getFinanceText(),
          score: currentScore.percent || scorePercent.textContent || '',
          rating: currentScore.rating || '',
          status: currentScore.status || '',
          stopFactors: getStopFactors().map(item => item.message).join('; '),
          selectedDocuments: selected.join(', '),
          missingDocuments: missing.join(', '),
          answersJson: JSON.stringify(answers),
          selectedDocumentIds: Array.from(selectedDocuments).join(', ')
        };
      }

      function getDeviceLabel() {
        const width = window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth || 0;
        const touch = navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0;
        if (width <= 640) return touch ? 'mobile' : 'narrow desktop';
        if (width <= 1024) return touch ? 'tablet' : 'small desktop';
        return 'desktop';
      }

      function sendGoogleSheetSnapshot(eventName) {
        if (!GOOGLE_SHEETS_WEBHOOK_URL) return;
        const body = JSON.stringify(getSubmissionSnapshot(eventName));
        try {
          if (navigator.sendBeacon) {
            const blob = new Blob([body], { type: 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' });
            if (navigator.sendBeacon(GOOGLE_SHEETS_WEBHOOK_URL, blob)) return;
          }
          fetch(GOOGLE_SHEETS_WEBHOOK_URL, {
            method: 'POST',
            mode: 'no-cors',
            keepalive: true,
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' },
            body
          }).catch(() => {});
        } catch (error) {}
      }

      function showLeadMessage(text, isError) {
        leadMessage.textContent = decodeText(text);
        leadMessage.classList.toggle('error', isError);
        leadMessage.classList.remove('hidden');
      }

      async function copyShareLink() {
        if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) {
          await navigator.clipboard.writeText(PUBLIC_TEST_URL);
        } else {
          const input = document.createElement('input');
          input.value = PUBLIC_TEST_URL;
          document.body.appendChild(input);
          input.select();
          document.execCommand('copy');
          input.remove();
        }
        shareMessage.classList.remove('hidden');
        shareMessageMobile.classList.remove('hidden');
        window.setTimeout(() => {
          shareMessage.classList.add('hidden');
          shareMessageMobile.classList.add('hidden');
        }, 2400);
      }

      function saveState(stage) {
        try {
          const currentStage = stage || (testStage.classList.contains('hidden') ? (questionStage.classList.contains('hidden') ? 'intro' : 'questions') : 'documents');
          localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify({
            answers,
            selectedDocuments: Array.from(selectedDocuments),
            step,
            stage: currentStage
          }));
        } catch (error) {
          // Storage can be unavailable in some embedded browsers; the test still works without it.
        }
      }

      function restoreState() {
        try {
          const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
          if (!raw) return;
          const state = JSON.parse(raw);
          Object.assign(answers, state.answers || {});
          (state.selectedDocuments || []).forEach(id => selectedDocuments.add(id));
          step = Math.max(0, Number(state.step || 0));
          if (state.stage === 'documents') {
            introStage.classList.add('hidden');
            questionStage.classList.add('hidden');
            testStage.classList.remove('hidden');
            currentDocuments = buildDocuments();
            renderSummary();
            renderDocuments();
            restoreDocumentSelections();
            updateScore();
            return;
          }
          if (state.stage === 'questions') {
            introStage.classList.add('hidden');
            questionStage.classList.remove('hidden');
            testStage.classList.add('hidden');
            const activeQuestions = getActiveQuestions();
            if (step >= activeQuestions.length) step = activeQuestions.length - 1;
            renderQuestion();
          }
        } catch (error) {
          localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);
        }
      }

      function restoreDocumentSelections() {
        currentDocuments.forEach(doc => {
          const checkbox = $(`#doc-${doc.id}`);
          if (!checkbox) return;
          if (doc.control && answers[doc.control.key]) {
            const control = $(`#control-${doc.control.key}`);
            if (control && doc.control.type === 'multi-select') {
              const values = getMultiAnswer(doc.control.key);
              control.querySelectorAll('input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(input => {
                input.checked = values.includes(input.value);
              });
            } else if (control) {
              control.value = answers[doc.control.key];
            }
          }
          const checked = selectedDocuments.has(doc.id) && (!doc.control || isControlValuePositive(doc));
          checkbox.checked = checked;
          if (!checked && doc.control && answers[doc.control.key]) selectedDocuments.delete(doc.id);
          syncDocumentRowState(doc);
        });
      }

      function escapeHtml(value) {
        return decodeText(value)
          .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
          .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
          .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
          .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
          .replace(/'/g, '&#039;');
      }

      function decodeText(value) {
        const text = String(value || '');
        if (!text.includes('&#') && !text.includes('&amp;#')) return text;
        const textarea = document.createElement('textarea');
        textarea.innerHTML = text.replace(/&amp;#/g, '&#');
        return textarea.value;
      }
    })();
  </script>
</body>
</html>
